prompt: Align show fib with VRP forwarding semantics
note: Added VRP-style FIB table headers, route totals, HU/U flags, age timestamps, displayed direct-route nexthops, and local /32 installation through full-name InLoopBack0 while preserving forwarding adjacency semantics
decisions: Use the full VVRP interface name InLoopBack0 instead of Huawei's abbreviated InLoop0
Preserve install timestamps across unchanged FIB resynchronization
Map RIB local host routes to InLoopBack0 only at the RM-to-FIB boundary
